summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of MiniMax Trading Dashboard. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All 18 frontend tests passed (100%). All 13 pages load correctly with proper data integration. Mobile responsive, theme toggle, and SIM/LIVE mode switch all functional.

minor.issue: Returns seeded/MOCKED data instead of live NSE data
minor.impact: INFORMATIONAL - Expected behavior per PRD; market data is simulated

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height -1 warnings during initial render
console_warnings.impact: LOW - Charts render correctly after initial load

backend: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials (admin/minimax123) returns ok:true
POST /api/auth/login with wrong credentials returns ok:false
GET /api/data returns dashboard data (day_pnl, trades, open_positions, pnl_curve)
GET /api/portfolio returns portfolio stats (equity_curve, daily_pnl_chart, metrics)
GET /api/report/daily returns daily trading report with strategy breakdown
GET /api/health returns system health status and component status
GET /api/market/live returns market data (MOCKED - indices, gainers, losers)
GET /api/ai/regime returns AI market regime analysis (BULLISH, confidence)
GET /api/strategies returns 4 active strategies
GET /api/strategies/performance returns per-strategy metrics with P&L history
GET /api/ai-decisions returns AI decision history with reasoning
GET /api/open-positions returns current open positions
GET /api/trades returns 21 trades with detail
GET /api/risk returns risk data (loss_pct, trading_allowed, risk_level)
GET /api/fo/calculate returns position sizing calculations
GET /api/fo/calculate with nifty_fut instrument returns lot-adjusted qty
GET /api/audit returns 14 issues all FIXED
GET /api/logs returns event logs from MongoDB
GET /api/config returns trading configuration
GET /api/mode returns current trading mode (PAPER)
POST /api/mode/switch to PAPER mode succeeds
POST /api/mode/switch to LIVE mode - requires valid broker credentials
frontend: Login page loads with username/password fields and theme toggle
Login error displays for wrong credentials
Dashboard page shows Day P&L (₹+402.50), Trades Today (4), Win Rate (75%), Portfolio (₹52,940)
Dashboard shows AI Market Regime banner (BULLISH | AGGRESSIVE LONGS, 95% confidence)
Dashboard shows Intraday P&L chart, Open Positions, Recent Trades tables
Portfolio page shows equity curve chart, daily P&L bar chart, and metrics
Daily Report page shows trade stats, strategy breakdown, portfolio growth chart
System Health page shows 6 component status checks and risk summary
Market Analysis page shows AI regime, 4 index cards, gainers/losers/most active
AI Brain page shows 20 AI decisions with reasoning steps and confidence
Strategies page shows 4 strategy cards with metrics and P&L charts
Positions page shows open positions table with unrealised P&L
Trade History page shows 21 trades, filter dropdown, clickable trade detail modal
Risk page shows loss meter, risk rules, trading status (TRADING ACTIVE)
F&O Calculator page - enter values, click calculate, shows 12 result rows
Audit & Logs page shows 14 issues (all FIXED) and 7 log entries
Settings page shows trading config and system config
features: Light/Dark theme toggle switches theme correctly
SIM/LIVE mode switch in topbar works (SIM active)
Navigation between all 13 pages works correctly
Mobile responsive - sidebar collapses and opens via hamburger menu
Day P&L displayed in topbar with color coding

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
API responses properly exclude MongoDB _id fields
Error handling implemented for login and API calls
Theme persistence using localStorage working correctly
seed_data_creation: 21 sample trades seeded across 6 days, 4 strategies, AI signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 pages fully functional. Backend has 21+ API endpoints all working. Market data is MOCKED (seeded). Login uses 'user' and 'pass' fields (not 'username'/'password'). SIM mode works, LIVE mode requires valid Zerodha broker credentials.

mocked_apis_list: /api/market/live - returns seeded market data (NSE blocks external API calls)
/api/ai/regime - AI regime based on seeded data
